title: Add third-knock anomaly rule
summary: Add core.anomaly.third_knock.v1 with threshold, invitation/debt, evidence, town-rule and non-combat resolution state using the M5 anomaly roster.
acceptance: Third-knock crisis state is an explicit serializable owner store with activation trace escalation resolution failure and terminal reason fields
Activation requires versioned threshold town-rule knowledge Chronicle evidence obligation and guesthouse basis facts before mutation
Low-risk evidence includes prior knocks witness disagreement threshold marks lodging register mismatch and obligation pressure
Resolution includes at least one non-combat containment or policy path and records structured accident-review rows
Focused tests cover prevention containment failure stale basis rejection cap hits serializable state and no UI or Promise/coroutine authority

history.details: Created by WM-0072 M5 planning DAG; remains proposed until dependencies are done.

objective: Implement the third-knock anomaly as a reusable M5 rule without bypassing Chronicle, obligation or town-rule authority.
forbiddenPaths: old-bridge faction governance season event implementation
risksAndFileOwnership: Risk: threshold behavior duplicates town-rule authority; town-rule knowledge and policy facts must stay in existing owner stores.
Risk: evidence becomes prose-only; tests must assert structured evidence and trace rows.
Risk: crisis progress hides in callbacks; all states must be serializable lanes.
benchmarkImpact: Adds third-knock activation transition evidence and cap-hit metrics; baseline update waits for WM-0083.
reviewRouting: Simulation-engineer completes to reviewer; systems-architect must be consulted before changing anomaly state machine shape or public schema.
rollbackModel: Revert third-knock owner store, tests, content def and docs; keep anomaly roster and borrowed-shadow data lift intact.
ownerGate: Keep third-knock mutable state in sim-core owner stores
Validate all basis versions before mutation
Emit structured reasons for activation rejection and terminal states
Block on public protocol save schema dependency UI authority or M6 scope

sparkEligibility.reason: New deterministic anomaly state-machine implementation is not suitable for Spark.
